summary: Add ship policy and resume state
description: Add machine-readable ship policy and durable resume/run state so loops can stop/restart safely and only commit/push according to explicit policy.
acceptance: Executor writes .go/runs/latest.json with resume command and budget status.
Ship policy supports none/local-commit/push with push gated by explicit flag.

evidence.summary: Added durable .go/runs/latest.json resume state and explicit ship policy none/local-commit/push with push gated by --allow-push. Local commit ship test proves clean git after go-loop execution. Updated benchmark and skill docs. Verification: pytest -q 17 passed; validate passed; make check passed; git diff --check passed.
